title: sideritis ochroleuca subsp. tafraoutiana
intro: Sideritis ochroleuca subsp. tafraoutiana is a plant species in the genus Sideritis, commonly known as ironwort. It is a type of flowering plant native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis ochroleuca subsp. tafraoutiana include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, and it can be found in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules.
